introSection: Unknown is an inverted steel roller coaster currently under construction at Disney's Hollywood Studios in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA. It is themed after the 2001 Disney Pixar film Monsters, Inc. and will be part of a new area themed to the city of Monstropolis from the film.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced at the D23 event in Anaheim, California, USA on August 10, 2024.

By November 2024, Disney confirmed the ride's location within the park.

On October 2025, Disney confirmed the name of the land/section that this coaster will be in will be named "Monstropolis".

fullText:
Unknown is an inverted steel roller coaster currently under construction at Disney's Hollywood Studios in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA. It is themed after the 2001 Disney Pixar film Monsters, Inc. and will be part of a new area themed to the city of Monstropolis from the film.

The ride was announced at the D23 event in Anaheim, California, USA on August 10, 2024.

By November 2024, Disney confirmed the ride's location within the park.

On October 2025, Disney confirmed the name of the land/section that this coaster will be in will be named "Monstropolis".
